name: Stelux Holdings International Limited
summary: Stelux Holdings International Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the retail of watches under the City Chain brand name. It is also involved in the wholesale of watches, including the Seiko and Grand Seiko brands; watch supply chain management; and manufacture of watch movement related to its house brands, such as Solvil et Titus. The company operates in Hong Kong, Macau, Mainland china, Europe, and rest of Asia. Stelux Holdings International Limited was founded in 1963 and is headquartered in San Po Kong, Hong Kong.
